title: schoenorchis aurea
intro: Schoenorchis aurea, also known as the gold orchid or golden shoal, is a type of orchid species native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Schoenorchis aurea include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate fever, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Schoenorchis aurea can be made into a tea or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties.
